bird.name: 草黃樹鴨
bird.summary: 草黃樹鴨（学名：Dendrocygna bicolor）是分佈在熱帶地區的樹鴨屬，包括中美洲、南美洲、撒哈拉以南非洲、印度次大陸及美國墨西哥灣沿岸地區。 种名 bicolor 意为“二色的”。

locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

locations.name: 墨西哥
locations.summary: 墨西哥合众国（西班牙語：Estados Unidos Mexicanos），通稱墨西哥（西班牙語：México），是北美洲南部的一个主权国家，北接美国，西濱太平洋，南鄰伯利兹、危地马拉，东面墨西哥湾。其领土面积达近198万平方公里，为美洲…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: 西印度群岛
locations.summary: 西印度群島（英語：West Indies；西班牙語：Indias Occidentales；法語：Indes occidentales）泛指南北美洲之間海域中的一個一連串的島群。北起美國佛羅里達半島南端；西起墨西哥尤卡坦半島東端。總島嶼數…

locations.name: 美国
locations.summary: 美利堅合眾國（英語：United States of America，縮寫：USA），简称合眾國（United States，縮寫：US）或美国、美利堅、亞美利加、美（America），是位於北美洲的聯邦制共和國。其由50個州、首都华盛顿…

locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨
relations.evidence: The fulvous whistling duck or fulvous tree duck (Dendrocygna bicolor) is a species of whistling duck that breeds across the world's tropical regions in much of Mexico and South America, the West Indies, the southern United States, sub-Saharan Africa and the Indian subcontinent

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨
relations.evidence: It is found in a broad belt across sub-Saharan Africa and down the east of the continent to South Africa and Madagascar

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨
relations.evidence: Its preferred habitat consists of wetlands with plentiful vegetation, including shallow lakes and paddy fields
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨
relations.evidence: Gulf Coastal Plain in the early to mid-20th century, given its affinity for rice-growing areas. Breeding in the northern American region is restricted to the Gulf Coastal Plain of Texas and Louisiana and localities in southern California and south- and east-central Florida. Observations of the bird outside the nesting season, especially since the 1950s have been recorded in temperate regions as far north as the Mississippi River Basin, eastern Great Lakes region, and along the Pacific and Atlantic Coasts right up to southern Canada. Wandering birds can turn up far beyond the normal range, sometimes staying to nest, as in Morocco, Peru and Hawaii. The fulvous whistling duck is found in lowland marshes and swamps in open, rice fields, flat country, and it avoids wooded areas
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨

Observations of the bird outside the nesting season, especially since the 1950s have been recorded in temperate regions as far north as the Mississippi River Basin, eastern Great Lakes region, and along the Pacific and Atlantic Coasts right up to southern Canada. Wandering birds can turn up far beyond the normal range, sometimes staying to nest, as in Morocco, Peru and Hawaii. relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

relations.subject: 草黃樹鴨
relations.evidence: However, the status of the two whistling duck species featured in the research is dubious since they are popular ornamental species, so their origin is unclear. Outside North America it is subject to hunting for food or because of its liking for rice, and persecution means that it is now rare in Madagascar
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
